chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يُجَامِعُ أَهْلَهُ فِي السَّفَرِ أَوْ يَقْدَمُ مِنْ سَفَرٍ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – The man who copulates with his wife during the journey, or he comes back from a journey during a Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/337)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/337)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يُسَافِرُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ أَ لَهُ أَنْ يُصِيبَ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man who travels during a Month of Ramazan, is it for him that he attains from the women?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who travels in the month of Ramadan: if he can have sexual relation with women. He (the Imam) said, ’Yes, he can do so.’”
